title: Review round 1: Phase 4f Headless bot
description: Review round 1 for nie-9m0p (Phase 4f: Headless bot). Parent: nie-9m0p.
notes: Maintainer risk: HIGH — Undocumented contracts between modules (on_message_hook env vars, event emission paths), implicit Phase 4f stubs without forward docs (payment.rs address generation, io_types::read_next()), silent error suppression (parse_params at debug, amount_zatoshi best-effort), and duplicate self-test logic. All 8 findings are documentation/API design debt that won't show as bugs until Phase 2+ integrations. Highest priority: doc Phase 4f stubs with Phase 2+ integration points.
